records.display_name: Montauk Branch Engineering Work

payload.claim_text: LIRR Engineering forces will be performing mud remediation, thermite welding and track surfacing between Sayville and Patchogue on the Montauk Branch.
payload.description: Engineering work on the Montauk Branch between Sayville and Patchogue

records.display_name: Funding source for track work programs

payload.claim_text: Funding for these projects is contained in the Long Island Rail Road Operating and MTA Capital Program budget.
payload.description: Funding source for all track work programs described

records.display_name: Van Wyck Bridge Widening State of Good Repair

payload.claim_text: Select tracks in Jay Interlocking, located just west of Jamaica, will be temporarily taken out of service to support State of Good Repair work related to the Van Wyck Bridge Widening Project on the weekends of September 28-29, October 5-6, and October 19-20.
payload.description: Van Wyck Bridge Widening Project is a State of Good Repair project affecting Jay Interlocking

records.display_name: NYCT cross-honors LIRR fares

payload.claim_text: NYCT will cross-honor LIRR fares in both directions during the Atlantic Branch service disruption.
payload.description: NYCT cross-honoring LIRR fares during Atlantic Branch switch installation work
